title: perf(core): optimize callback manager hot paths
body_text:
## Summary

Optimizes the langchain_core callback manager hot paths identified by profiling langgraph's `react_agent` benchmark, where callback overhead accounts for ~35% of runtime.

- **`get_child()`**: pass state directly to constructor instead of calling `set_handlers`/`add_tags`/`add_metadata` sequentially (**-22%**)
- **`add_tags()`**: use set-based dedup instead of O(n) list scans per tag, early return when tags list is empty (**-70% on duplicate tags**)
- **`handle_event`/`ahandle_event`**: early return when handlers list is empty
- **`_configure()`**: skip throwaway `CallbackManager` construction on the common path where `inheritable_callbacks` is provided

### Behavioral note on `add_tags()`

The old `add_tags()` had "move to end" semantics — existing tags were removed and re-appended. The new implementation skips duplicates instead. This is safe because tag order is not meaningful across the codebase: `merge_configs()` sorts, `LangChainTracer._start_trace()` sorts, `BaseCallbackManager.merge()` uses sets, and tests compare with `sorted()`.

## Test plan

- [x] All 1701 `langchain-core` unit tests passing
- [ ] Run langgraph `react_agent` benchmark to validate end-to-end improvement

> [!NOTE]
> This PR was developed with AI agent assistance (Claude Code).

entities.name: Langchain Core
entities.description: The core library whose callback manager hot paths are being optimized.

entities.name: Callback Manager
entities.description: A component within Langchain Core responsible for handling callbacks, identified as a performance bottleneck.

entities.name: Langgraph
entities.description: A library that uses Langchain Core, whose react_agent benchmark helped identify performance issues.

entities.name: React Agent Benchmark
entities.description: A specific benchmark within Langgraph used to profile performance and identify hot paths.

entities.name: Callback Overhead
entities.description: The performance cost associated with callback operations, accounting for a significant portion of runtime.

entities.name: Runtime Optimization
entities.description: The overall goal of improving the execution speed of the callback manager hot paths.

entities.name: get_child()
entities.description: A method in the Callback Manager identified as a hot path, optimized by passing state directly to its constructor.

entities.name: add_tags()
entities.description: A method in the Callback Manager for adding tags, identified as a hot path and optimized for duplicate handling.

entities.name: handle_event()
entities.description: A method in the Callback Manager for handling events, optimized with an early return.

entities.name: ahandle_event()
entities.description: An asynchronous method in the Callback Manager for handling events, optimized with an early return.

entities.name: _configure()
entities.description: A method related to Callback Manager configuration, optimized to skip unnecessary construction.

entities.name: Set-based Dedup
entities.description: An optimization technique using sets to efficiently remove duplicate tags.

entities.name: O(n) List Scans
entities.description: An inefficient method for checking duplicates in lists, replaced by set-based dedup.

entities.name: Early Return
entities.description: An optimization technique to exit a function early when a condition is met, reducing unnecessary processing.

entities.name: CallbackManager Construction
entities.description: The process of initializing a Callback Manager instance, which was optimized to skip throwaway constructions.

entities.name: inheritable_callbacks
entities.description: A parameter provided during Callback Manager configuration that allows skipping throwaway construction.

entities.name: Tag Order
entities.description: A behavioral aspect of tags that was confirmed not to be meaningful across the codebase, allowing for optimization of add_tags().

entities.name: Langchain-Core Unit Tests
entities.description: Automated tests for the Langchain Core library, all of which are passing after the changes.

entities.name: End-to-End Improvement
entities.description: The desired overall performance gain validated by running the Langgraph react_agent benchmark.

entities.name: AI Agent Assistance
entities.description: The use of an AI agent to help develop the pull request.

entities.name: Claude Code
entities.description: A specific AI agent used for development assistance.

extracted_data.summary: This PR optimizes Langchain Core's callback manager hot paths, identified by profiling Langgraph's `react_agent` benchmark, by improving `get_child()`, `add_tags()`, `handle_event()`, `ahandle_event()`, and `_configure()` methods to reduce callback overhead.
